parameters.functionCode:
// Priority URLs for CWV monitoring — city pages + core conversion surfaces.
const urls = [
  'https://funloading360.co.uk/',
  'https://funloading360.co.uk/book',
  'https://funloading360.co.uk/corporate',
  'https://funloading360.co.uk/weddings',
  'https://funloading360.co.uk/pricing',
  'https://funloading360.co.uk/locations/chelmsford',
  'https://funloading360.co.uk/locations/london',
  'https://funloading360.co.uk/locations/southend-on-sea',
  'https://funloading360.co.uk/locations/basildon',
  'https://funloading360.co.uk/locations/colchester',
  'https://funloading360.co.uk/locations/romford',
  'https://funloading360.co.uk/locations/maidstone',
  'https://funloading360.co.uk/locations/canterbury',
  'https://funloading360.co.uk/locations/bromley'
];
return urls.map(u => ({ json: { url: u } }));
